items.headline:
US farms are disappearing at an alarming rate:

The number of US farms fell -15,000 YoY in 2025, to 1.87 million, the lowest since the 1850s.

This marks the 3rd annual decline and the 6th over the last 7 years.

Over this period, the number of farms has dropped -158,200, or -8%.

items.headline:
Gas prices are up. Rent is up. Groceries are up.

Jobs are disappearing. Unemployment is rising. 

War in the Middle East is pushing oil higher. And AI is replacing white-collar workers faster than anyone predicted.

All of this is happening at the SAME TIME.
